name: stn-skills
description: Professional skill suite for GitHub Copilot CLI by Sven Thiermann. 8 skills: session-init (auto-discovery at session start), build-feature (end-to-end pipeline), brainstorming (multi-lens design exploration), plan-writing (DAG-based zero-placeholder plans), pipeline-handoff-validator (artifact contract validation), plan-execution (checkpoint-verified execution with fidelity scoring), codebase-audit (13-domain evidence-based repository audit), and codebase-quality-bootstrap (CLAUDE.md + hooks generator). See docs/copilot-cli.md for Copilot-specific install and known limitations.
